title: heliconia sanctae-theresae
intro: Heliconia sanctae-theresae, also known as the Santa Theresa heliconia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Heliconiaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Heliconia sanctae-theresae include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and aiding in the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
